---
title: "My blog"
description: "This is where I store what I worked on and I can come back to them to revise my knowledge. I tried to explain them as easy as possible how you can do them by hand. I hope you get something from this and find it interesting as well."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort:
    - "date"
    - "title desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [image, date, title, author, reading-time]
  feed:
    categories: [news, posts]
page-layout: full
---
